title: Russian-studies bibliography + reflexive meta-analysis session

fields.vision: Russian-studies bibliography + reflexive meta-analysis session is a source packet for this is a session-continuity handoff: its job is to make a single chat session portable so a future pass, future session, or future analytical layer can pick up without loss.
fields.mechanism: The mechanism is professional-evidence curation: keep career-facing materials limited, unclassified, role-appropriate, and tied to concrete work products without exposing private or unsuitable application material.
fields.source_utilization: Russia, Eurasia, and security-state analysis. Use as the strongest local source reservoir for Russia Desk, regional studies, and security-state pages. Vision: Ground Russia-facing pages in a serious regional-security and post-Soviet studies corpus. Mechanism: Extract security-service, influence, regime, NATO, Ukraine-war, Chechnya, strategic-culture, and Russian policy mechanisms. Plan: Close-read Russia Desk and Russia-adjacent Master Bundle pages first because the source library reservoir is unusually deep here. Status: source library identified as candidate scholarly support; direct quotation requires exact passage review. Remaining gap: Need extraction of exact passages and APA author/title reconciliation before public citation support. Source pool: 121 deduplicated local title candidates; 128 catalogue support rows. Examples: No Place for Russia; Russian Influence Operations and the War in Ukraine. Intelligence tradecraft, counterintelligence, and analytic method. Use source library intelligence titles as method authority and intelligence-domain stressors. Vision: Present intelligence pages as disciplined analytic-method and tradecraft demonstrations. Mechanism: Tie claims to collection, covert action, deception, interrogation, bias-control, and analytic-logic mechanisms. Plan: Prioritize Capstone, SATS, CI, RAG integrity, and analyst-assurance pages for close-reading. Status: source library identified as candidate scholarly support; direct quotation requires exact passage review. Remaining gap: Need method-passage extraction and claim-to-source linkage. Source pool: 60 deduplicated local title candidates; 63 catalogue support rows. Examples: Improving Intelligence Analysis; Leading Intelligence Analysis. source library scholarly-source routing with author correction. Raw filenames often append Nik_Murano and are not treated as authorship evidence....
fields.plan: How this briefing says the vision should be accomplished, translated into a public project route. Start with README.md — handoff_manifest.json for status and open threads — exhaustive_recap.md for what actually was said (turn-by-turn) — analytical_synthesis.md for structural interpretation. If picking up the thread in a new session, start from the recommended_next_passes_if_continued list: verification pass against publisher catalogs, expansion pass for missing subdomains, operationalization pass into Zotero + reading plan. Wire or preserve the implementation files: None — this is a Markdown/JSON session-continuity package. The work products are designed to be read and consumed as context for a future research pass.
fields.remaining_gaps: Retain the packet as a completed authority layer, then decide whether it should remain a reference file or become a live room, method page, or public proof object.
fields.detailed_source_vision: This is a session-continuity handoff: its job is to make a single chat session portable so a future pass, future session, or future analytical layer can pick up without loss. It covers only the visible user and assistant messages in the chat context — hidden system or developer instructions are out of scope. The package reconstructs what was asked, what was answered, what structure was used, what claims were made, what remains unresolved, and what the next sensible moves are. The visible conversation's substance is a research-bibliography curation exercise: the user asked for recent handbooks, companions, and guides from Routledge/SAGE/Oxford/Cambridge/Palgrave/Blackwell on Russian security, foreign policy, military affairs, history, and political authoritarianism. The assistant responded with a tiered "ruthlessly up-to-date core stack" of 20+ volumes organized into four tiers (direct Russia/security — authoritarianism+illiberalism+coercive statecraft ?...
fields.detailed_source_mechanism: The mechanism is professional-evidence curation: keep career-facing materials limited, unclassified, role-appropriate, and tied to concrete work products without exposing private or unsuitable application material.

maintenance_rule: Update this blueprint before strengthening public claims on the website. Do not use word count, module count, or status percentage as a substitute for concrete project substance.
claim_ceiling_rule: Public claims may rise only when the built components, source use, status, and remaining gaps are updated here and reflected in the rendered page.

public_standard_check.Vision: This document supports the public account of Blueprint by preserving the project purpose, reader-facing claim, and professional-portfolio role.
public_standard_check.Mechanism: It connects source material, project components, implementation state, and next actions so the work can be inspected rather than merely asserted.
public_standard_check.What is built: The supporting evidence is the named page, blueprint, packet, project file, source record, or implementation page described in the document.
public_standard_check.Source use: Sources are used as method and source background, domain grounding, or project history; direct quotation and stronger factual claims require passage-level review.
public_standard_check.Plan: Bind claims to exact source anchors, visible implementation evidence, or a narrower public claim.
public_standard_check.Status: Current support record for the professional package unless explicitly marked archival.
public_standard_check.Remaining Gaps: Passage-level source check, implementation verification, citation cleanup, and proportional public wording remain open where evidence is incomplete.

public_pitch.what_it_is: Russian-studies bibliography + reflexive meta-analysis session is a source packet for this is a session-continuity handoff: its job is to make a single chat session portable so a future pass, future session, or future analytical layer can pick up without loss.
public_pitch.distinctive_mechanism: The mechanism is professional-evidence curation: keep career-facing materials limited, unclassified, role-appropriate, and tied to concrete work products without exposing private or unsuitable application material.
public_pitch.why_it_matters: It makes adversarial language and influence mechanisms inspectable by separating phrase, channel, target perception, amplification path, and judgment effect.
